title: dolicholobium ridsdalei
intro: Dolicholobium ridsdalei is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Ridsdale's dolicholobium. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The leaves and roots of the plant are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and swelling. In traditional herbal medicine, Dolicholobium ridsdalei is prepared by boiling the leaves and roots in water to create a decoction, which is then used to treat various ailments.
